[ ^ o B o 25/1/2003-^"S5^^t/(i^5-n)] fcisufl :—^^^-qff^%rH^u|^;3T*ift^nii%y4i^|i4 Bftlcf % B*m B~ ^T^f *TIB ^ft B£ •STfa^FTTlt:— ( 1 ) Bo BT.^.ft. 238, f^FP 8-2-1991 (2) Bo 7-7/94 " ^ " S ^ f ^ f ^ 2 3 - 2 - 1 9 9 6 (3) Tfo^7T.3TT. 140 (3T), 1 ^ ^ 1 7 - 2 - 2 0 0 0 ( 4 ) Ho ^l.STT. 547 (3?), 1^m> 25-5-2000 (5) Bo -^T.STT. 894 (3T), 1^1377-9-2001 (6) "Ho "^T.3Tf. 32 (3T), 1 ^ ^ 1 0 - 1 - 2 0 0 3 (7) B o ^ . s a 599 ( 3?), 1 ^ ^ 2 6 - 5 - 2 0 0 3 ( 8 ) Bo ^T.3TT. 955 (-3*), 1 ^ * 2 1 - 8 - 2 0 0 3 MINISTRY OF ENVmONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th January, 2004 S.0.69(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 15 of the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, 1960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government, on the advice of the Board, hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment & Forests, S.O. 32 (E) dated 10-1-2003, as amended vide notification S.O. 599(E) dated 26-5-2003. In the said notification, Serial No. 1A and the entries relating thereto, shall be deleted. Serial No. 1 and the entries relat- ing thereto, shall be substituted by the entry namely :— 1. Additional Secretary, Incharge of Animal Welfare, Ministry of Environment & Forests NewDelhi-110003. —Chairperson [F. No. 25/l/2003-AWD/(\bl. II)] DESH DEEPAK VERMA, Jt. Secy. Note :— (1) No. (2) No. (3) No. (4) No. (5) No. (6) No. (7) No. (8) No. The following notifications were issued earlier in relation to the Committee for the Purpose of Control and Supervision of Experiments on Animals:— G.S.R 238dated8-2-1991 7-7/94 AW dated 23-2-1996 S.O. 140 (E)dated 17-2-2000 S.O. 547(E) dated 25-5-2000 S.O. 894 (E) dated 7-9-2001 S.O. 32(E) dated 10-1-2003 S.O. 599 (E) dated 26-5-2003 S.O. 955 (E)dated21-8-2003 138 GI/2004 Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, and Published by the Controller Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
